modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't access files in Teams due to connection errors.

full_description_text: 
The user was trying to open files in Teams but ran into some issues. They got a message saying the server IP address couldn't be found and that there was a problem connecting to Microsoft 365. It seems like they might not have the right permissions or the list could be deleted. They were a bit frustrated and just wanted to get their work done.
short_description: Can't access files in Teams due to connection errors.
description: The user was trying to open files in Teams but ran into some issues.
